content.full_text:
Lou and Martha Haddad  
5 Deer Stalker Path  
Monterey, CA 93940  
(408) 373-5222

Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street, Suite 800,  
Sacramento, Ca., 95814  

Ladies/Gentlemen:  
October 12, 1990  

I have had difficulty reaching you by phone, hence this letter.

A question has risen relative to left over campaign funds from my 1988 campaign. I ave transferred it sometime in August to my new account. According to the city clerk's instructions, I noted this on line 15 of the summary page and on Schedule G. Now I'm told that this is wrong. Please notify me if there is a problem.

Thank you for your kind attention.

Sincerely,

Lou Haddad
